ModMetaData.name: Tech Hunter's Delight
ModMetaData.author: Lambda
ModMetaData.description: Tired of waiting at 4x speed for a research bar to slowly fill? Are your colonists incapable of critical thinking? Do you think it's a bit silly that staring at a bench for long enough will grant your tribals knowledge of the Johnson-Tanaka drive? Pack your gear and go hunt for the knowledge of the ancients instead!
